title: Pc's Effective Plants
description:
Find plants in your world that give you effects!
This Mod adds new plants and flowers which give you nice and bad effects.
body:
# Pc's Effective Plants Mod!


**Overview:** This Mod adds new plants and flowers which give you nice and bad effects.

**Plants:** There are these plants with these effects:
```
Plant                 Effect
Fire Flower           Sets you on Fire
Poison Flower         Poision
Regeneration Flower   Regeneration + Saturation
Glow Flower           Glowing
```


**Effects:** Actually there is one new effect called "fire". Basically it sets you on fire. This Effect is in alpha version and you may better not use it...
```
Effect   What it does
Fire     Sets you on Fire (Effect levels are not available!)
```


**Credits:** Thanks to MCreator, Jungy, PcMatch for Coding, Textures and more
> MCreator by Pylo
> 
> Coding (using MCreator): PcMatch
> 
> Textures from Texturepack Jineric by Jungy
> 
**Version:** For the versions look here: https://modrinth.com/mod/pcs-effective-plants/versions

**Official Website:** https://pcseffectiveplants.onepage.me
